name: mymind
title: mymind
description: Search, save, upload, and organize your mymind library with the official API
author: arian

commands.name: search-mymind
commands.title: Search mymind
commands.subtitle: mymind
commands.description: Search your library, filter by type, and open rich item details

commands.name: search-spaces
commands.title: Search Spaces
commands.subtitle: mymind
commands.description: Browse, search, and manage spaces and the items inside them

commands.name: search-tags
commands.title: Search Tags
commands.subtitle: mymind
commands.description: Browse your manual tags and the items inside each tag

commands.name: save-to-mymind
commands.title: Save to mymind
commands.subtitle: mymind
commands.description: Save links, notes, and files with tags, spaces, and attached notes

commands.name: show-mymind-menu-bar
commands.title: Show mymind Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: mymind
commands.description: Open quick save and search actions for mymind from the menu bar

tools.name: search-mymind
tools.title: Search mymind
tools.description: Search the user's mymind library by keyword with an optional type filter and return concise, structured results

tools.name: get-object
tools.title: Get Object
tools.description: Fetch the full details of a single mymind object by id, including its note body and attached notes

tools.name: list-spaces
tools.title: List Spaces
tools.description: List the user's mymind spaces (collections) with their ids, names, and colors

tools.name: list-tags
tools.title: List Tags
tools.description: List the user's own manual tags so they can be reused when tagging items

tools.name: list-space-colors
tools.title: List Space Colors
tools.description: List the fixed palette of colors (name and hex) that mymind spaces support

tools.name: save-link
tools.title: Save Link
tools.description: Save a URL to mymind with an optional title, attached note, tags, and space

tools.name: save-note
tools.title: Save Note
tools.description: Save a Markdown text note to mymind with an optional title, tags, and space

tools.name: create-space
tools.title: Create Space
tools.description: Create a new space (collection) in mymind, auto-assigning a palette color when one isn't specified

tools.name: update-space
tools.title: Update Space
tools.description: Rename or recolor an existing mymind space using one of the palette colors

tools.name: add-tags-to-object
tools.title: Add Tags to Object
tools.description: Add one or more tags to an existing mymind object

tools.name: remove-tags-from-object
tools.title: Remove Tags from Object
tools.description: Remove one or more tags from an existing mymind object

tools.name: move-object-to-space
tools.title: Move Object to Space
tools.description: Move an object into a single space, replacing any spaces it currently belongs to

tools.name: add-note-to-object
tools.title: Add Note to Object
tools.description: Attach a Markdown note to an existing mymind object

tools.name: pin-object
tools.title: Pin Object
tools.description: Pin an object to the top of the user's mymind (Top of Mind)

tools.name: unpin-object
tools.title: Unpin Object
tools.description: Remove an object from Top of Mind

tools.name: delete-object
tools.title: Delete Object
tools.description: Delete an object from mymind, moving it to Recently Deleted

ai.instructions: mymind is a personal library ("your mind") of saved objects: links and articles, text notes, images, videos, and PDFs. Objects can have manual tags and belong to spaces (collections). Object ids and space ids are opaque strings; always obtain them from search-mymind, get-object, or list-spaces rather than guessing. Use search-mymind to find an object and its id before editing, tagging, moving, pinning, or deleting it. Reuse existing tag names from list-tags instead of inventing near-duplicates. To place an item in a space, resolve the space name to its id with list-spaces first. Saving, creating, tagging, moving, pinning, adding notes, and deleting all require a full-access key; with a read-only key these actions fail with a clear message, so don't retry them. Spaces only support mymind's fixed color palette (Red, Pink, Mauve, Peach, Coral, Orange, Yellow, Lime, Mint, Emerald, Teal, Ice, Sky, Cyan, Blue, Iris, Purple, Lavender, Silver, Black; list-space-colors returns the exact names and hex values). When creating a space, don't require or ask the user to choose a color first—just create it: if the user named a supported palette color pass it, otherwise omit the color and create-space auto-assigns one. Never invent an arbitrary hex color for a space. After creating a space, tell the user it was created and which color was assigned, and mention they can ask for a different color. To change a space's name or color later, use update-space (colors must be one of the palette names).

evals.input: @mymind save a note that says buy oat milk

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
